title: Fragrant Velvety Saudi Lentils Stew
description: A sour, velvety comfort dish simmered in a clay pot, blending fragrant spices with tender red lentils.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a clay pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Mix in cumin, coriander, cardamom, and paprika, and toast spices for 30 seconds.
Add red lentils and vegetable broth to the pot, stirring to combine.
Bring mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and simmer, partially covered, for 20 minutes or until lentils are tender.
Stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
If using tomatoes, fold them in now and cook for 2 more minutes.
Remove pot from heat and let stew rest for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Serve hot straight from the mini cocotte, garnish with a drizzle of olive oil or a sprinkle of fresh cilantro if desired.
